Hi Dennis,

Thank you for applying for the position of  Scrum Master​​​​​​​ here at Leonardo, we appreciate the time you have invested so far.

In many cases before we can fully evaluate your application you will be asked to complete a few initial screening questions. We would appreciate if you could respond to these questions as quickly as possible. We will then review your application and be in touch to notify you of the next stage.

We wish you the very best of luck and thanks again for applying.


Leonardo Talent Attraction Team

Hi Dennis,

Thank you for applying for the position of  Scrum Master​​​​​​​ here at Leonardo, we appreciate the time you have invested so far.

In many cases before we can fully evaluate your application you will be asked to complete a few initial screening questions. We would appreciate if you could respond to these questions as quickly as possible. We will then review your application and be in touch to notify you of the next stage.

We wish you the very best of luck and thanks again for applying.

Subject: Block | Thank you for applying
Body:
Hi Dennis,

Thank you for your interest in joining our team at Block. We are excited to receive your application for the Enterprise Seller Onboarding (ESO) Technical Project Manager role.

Our recruiting team reviews each application and will reach out to you if there is a potential match with our teams. 

In the meantime, we invite you to explore block.xyz <https://block.xyz/>  to learn more about our latest news, products, and company culture.

We use BrightHire to record interviews to support a fair and consistent process. Recordings are retained according to our standard Greenhouse data retention policies. You can ask the interviewer to pause the recording at anytime. If you prefer not to be recorded for any interviews, you can opt out here <https://app.brighthire.ai/candidate-opt-out/g-9Sh0-UTMOtSY4p3HfGjg> . Your privacy is important to us, and opting out will not affect your candidacy.

We appreciate you considering Block for the next step in your career!

Block Talent Team
Careers <https://block.xyz/careers/jobs?>  | Applicant Privacy <https://block.xyz/en/legal/applicant-privacy-notice>  | Stay Connected <https://block.xyz/documents/connect-with-us>

Subject: Thank you for applying to NECSWS
Body:
Dear D,

Thank you for submitting your application for the position of Software Implementation Project Manager. 

We are reviewing all CV's received and will consider how relevant your skills and experience are for the role.  Should we wish to progress your application further we will contact you directly in due course. In the meantime many thanks for your interest in NECSWS.

Best regards,
Jonathan Howarth

At Motorola Solutions, we believe that the next big idea can come from anyone, anywhere, at any time. We foster innovative thinking, enabling Motorolans to explore their curiosities, shape their careers and maximize their impact to help keep people safer, everywhere.

Subject: We’ve received your application for the Principal Agile Project Manager - FTC role!
Body:
Hi Dennis,

Thank you for taking the time to apply to the Principal Agile Project Manager - FTC role here at OVO, it’s great that you’re interested in joining us.

We’ve received your application, and will be reviewing it shortly. If we feel your skills and experience match what we’re looking for, a member of our Talent Acquisition team will get in touch.

We try our best to get back to everybody who applies but if you haven’t heard from us within a few weeks, we’re sorry to say that it’s likely your application hasn’t been successful on this occasion.

We will keep your details on file but if you want them to be removed, please email the Talent Acquisition team at : recruitment@ovoenergy.com

Thank you!


The Talent Acquisition Team
